name: “Dou Ahou” man is girl and baskemtball player still, Rukawa Kaede
description:
She wears the 11 for Shohoku

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Two years after the end of the manga (the Shohoku team is just girls go along with it), yup she’s ranked as the best player in Japan but she’d hardly had a supporting cast around her in these two years. Her only good teammates were Miyagi and Sakuragi, but what’s that got to do with anything. Right now she’s focused on going to America after this last season with Shohoku.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

It’s gonna be the genius next time, I promise
